query:
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN ap_count > 0 THEN 'COM_PDI' ELSE 'SEM_PDI' END as status_pdi,
  CASE WHEN a.consultorId IS NOT NULL THEN 'COM_MENTOR' ELSE 'SEM_MENTOR' END as status_mentor,
  COUNT(*) as qtd
FROM (
  SELECT a.id, a.consultorId,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assessment_pdi ap WHERE ap.alunoId = a.id) as ap_count
  FROM alunos a
  WHERE a.isActive = 1
) a
GROUP BY status_pdi, status_mentor
ORDER BY status_pdi, status_mentor;
